MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS
Off Calendar Aug-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re; DEFENDANT TONY ARCHULETA-PERKINS AND TIMOTHY ARCHULETA-PERKINS' MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Archuleta-Perkins's unopposed Motion to Stay is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Matter Not Reported. Bailiff: Kwong. (302/RCE)
